query:
UPDATE users 
SET leaderId = (SELECT id FROM users WHERE email = 'dina.makiyama@sebrae.to.gov.br'),
    departamentoId = (SELECT id FROM departamentos WHERE nome LIKE '%Ckm Talents%')
WHERE email = 'bruno.vieira@to.sebrae.com.br';
